title: ceratostylis ovatilabris
intro: Ceratostylis ovatilabris is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is valued for its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ceratostylis ovatilabris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or tablets.
